objective: Run a localized spaCy-based linguistic analysis over the dom0 corpus and emit derived analysis artifacts without mutating the raw glossary substrate.

analysis_targets.name: token_layer
analysis_targets.description: Tokenize the corpus and emit token-level JSON artifacts.

analysis_targets.name: lemma_layer
analysis_targets.description: Emit lemma-based views if supported by the chosen pipeline or lookups configuration.

analysis_targets.name: kwic_layer
analysis_targets.description: Emit keyword-in-context windows for high-signal terms.

analysis_targets.name: collocation_layer
analysis_targets.description: Emit collocation and co-occurrence artifacts over the localized corpus.

open_decisions: whether to install a trained English pipeline such as en_core_web_sm
whether to install spacy-lookups-data for lemmatization support in a blank-pipeline path
which output root to use for derived artifacts
success_criteria: spaCy analysis runs entirely from the localized dom0 environment
derived artifacts are emitted separately from glossary.json
pipeline choice and linguistic limitations are recorded explicitly
